headline: Global Payments Balances Middle East Disruption With US$1b Debt Refinance
summary: Global Payments is reporting business disruption tied to the Middle East conflict, as airline clients experience service interruptions. The company has completed a $1 billion debt offering intended to refinance upcoming maturities and increase financial flexibility. These developments arrive as investors watch how external shocks and balance sheet decisions affect Global Payments (NYSE: GPN). For investors watching Global Payments at a current share price of $68.67, the mix of geopolitical...
